components.control_leakage: 0..1 penalty for explaining Avar Tar, shuffles, or non-469 controls
components.lore_fit: 0..1 preregistered fit to clue ledger; context never overrides controls
components.mdl_gain: bits saved versus the frozen baseline, normalized by 1000 bits for leaderboard display
components.prediction_score: 0..1 normalized predictive accuracy or coverage on declared target/holdout
components.rule_complexity: 0..1 penalty for table-like rules, exceptions, free parameters, and lookup disguise

exploration_policy: no hard coverage cutoff during exploration
no hard exception-count cutoff during exploration
record weak and failed hypotheses before pruning
zero omission is a supporting render layer, not the matrix formula
promotion_gate: must not use external holdout for fitting
must not explain Avar Tar as well as real 469
